title: Common-Shrek
description: Why is it so hard to pronounce...
body:
Common-Shrek is a simple ressourcepack correcting a Mojank error while naming the ~~skulk schulk scuklkl~~, corrected to "Shrek"

| Language | Supported |
|-----------|-----------|
|[English (GB)](https://github.com/craftish37/Common-Shrek/pull/3)|✅|
|English (USA)|✅|
|French (France)|✅|
|LOLCAT (USA)|✅|
|[Latvian](https://github.com/craftish37/Common-Shrek/pull/1)|✅|
|[Flemish (Dutch)](https://github.com/craftish37/Common-Shrek/pull/2)|✅|
|Coming Soon...|🚧|

Textures by [ItisBeez](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/warden-shrek/)

Add your language translation by creating a Pull Request [here](https://github.com/craftish37/Common-Shrek/pulls)!

Need support ? Join the Discord [here](https://discord.gg/H8xZpfscCg)
